description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white, complemented by large windows and glass panels that allow for ample natural light. Lush landscaping surrounds the house, including tall trees and manicured shrubs, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The property features a driveway leading to a garage, as well as a paved walkway to the main entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller, rectangular ones distributed across the facade. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal overhang, blending seamlessly into the modern design.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping. Features include a driveway, garage, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with dense greenery and a driveway leading up to the property, highlighting the flat roof and white facade.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance, surrounded by tall trees and shrubs, with the driveway and walkway clearly visible.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the garage entrance, a paved driveway, and the main door, with landscaping on both sides of the house.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a more private side of the house, with additional greenery and a clear view of the flat roof and modern window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance
